Home / Patients / Payments & Billing

Payments & Billing

Our healthcare professionals see all patients, regardless of their ability to pay. Please bring your current insurance or member ID card to every appointment.

Depending on your insurance, payment may be required at time of service or billed monthly.

Accepted Payment Methods

Cash · Check · Visa · Mastercard · Discover · American Express

Billing Department
(209) 636-5550
Download Sliding Fee Discount Application →

Good Faith Estimate

You have the right to receive a written cost estimate at least 1 business day before any non-emergency scheduled service. This covers medical items, tests, drugs, equipment, and facility fees.

You may dispute a bill that is $400 or more higher than the estimate you received.

More info: cms.gov/nosurprises or call (209) 636-5550

For Stockton Residents

Mobile Community Response: In partnership with the City of Stockton, Community Medical Centers offers an alternative to 911 for Stockton citizens in need of behavioral health services. If you or someone you know is experiencing mental distress, please call (833) 311-2273, 7 days a week, 8:00 am to 11:00 pm. This helpline is for non-violent individuals with mild to moderate symptoms.
